goal: Integrate all remote branches into local main with resolved conflicts and validated build.
constraints: Operate under AGENTS.md guardrails and repository policies
Avoid network-dependent commands beyond existing FETCH_HEAD data
Use pnpm scripts for validation commands
Preserve git history; no rebases or history rewrites
Ensure working tree clean before finalizing

acceptance.then: main contains commits from every remote branch without unresolved conflicts

acceptance.when: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm smoke execute

steps.expect: Ordered list of remote branches for integration

input.command: for b in ...; do git merge --no-ff origin/$b; done

steps.expect: All merges applied with conflicts resolved

input.command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm smoke

risks: Numerous merge conflicts across multiple branches
Potential redundant or conflicting feature changes
Repository size or complexity causing smoke test failures
rollback: git reset --hard to last clean commit
Re-run pnpm setup if dependencies diverge
Document conflicts that cannot be resolved for manual follow-up
